nodes.name: typography.css
nodes.summary: Typography CSS classes for markdown, code, UI labels, headings, and chat layout columns

nodes.name: semanticTypographyClasses
nodes.summary: Semantic font-size classes: typography-markdown, typography-code, typography-ui-header, typography-ui-label, typography-meta, typography-micro

nodes.name: headingTypographyClasses
nodes.summary: Heading typography classes typography-h1/h2/h3 using markdown font size differentiated by weight and letter-spacing

nodes.name: markdownTypographyClasses
nodes.summary: Markdown content typography classes: typography-markdown-body, typography-markdown-h1 through h4

nodes.name: uiElementTypographyClasses
nodes.summary: UI element typography classes: typography-ui-button, typography-ui-caption

nodes.name: chatLayoutClasses
nodes.summary: Chat column layout classes: chat-column (48rem), chat-input-column, chat-message-column with wide-chat-layout (64rem) variant

nodes.name: modelFavoriteButton
nodes.summary: Model favorite button styles with focus-visible outline and active scale transform
